title: poa acicularifolia subsp. acicularifolia
intro: Poa acicularifolia subsp. acicularifolia, commonly known as a type of grass, is a plant species within the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa acicularifolia subsp. acicularifolia include potential relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to support immune function and lower blood pressure. Poa acicularifolia subsp. acicularifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
